testimonials.title: Egyptians who got their bills under control
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from real users saving money with Kashf

ahmed.name: Ahmed Khalil
ahmed.title: Father of 3, Nasr City
ahmed.quote: كنت دايماً مفاجأة من الفاتورة، لكن كشف خلاني أعرف استهلاكي بالظبط وبقت تنبيهات قبل ما الفاتورة تزيد.

omar.name: Omar Samy
omar.title: Business Owner, Alexandria
omar.quote: كنت مش عارف أحسب الفاتورة إزاي، كشف حل المشكلة وبي توصيات عملية بالذكاء الاصطناعي.

karim.name: Karim Hassan
karim.title: Engineer, New Cairo
karim.quote: I was skeptical at first, but the OCR meter scanning is impressive. Saved 340 EGP on my last bill.

welcome.heroSubtitle: Kashf uses advanced AI and real-time tracking to predict Sheriha jumps, sending you alerts before you enter expensive tiers.
welcome.demoPlaceholderText: See how Kashf scans meter readings, tracks consumption tiers, and warns you about bill spikes.
welcome.featuresText: AI meter scanning, Sheriha tracking, tier-up warnings, and personalized energy-saving advice.
welcome.howItWorksText: Scan your meter, Kashf reads it and calculates your consumption and tier, then shows a clear dashboard with actionable tips.
welcome.pricingText: Start for free — flexible plans coming soon for your household.
welcome.meterSectionSubtitle: Experience the real-time feedback of Kashf's virtual utility meter. Watch your consumption zones and plan ahead to stay in control.

features.smartMeterDesc: OCR-powered instant meter reading via your phone camera
features.aiAnalysisDesc: Machine learning models trained on Egyptian usage patterns
features.predictionDesc: Real-time tier tracking with 48-hour cost forecasting
features.pwaDesc: Works on mobile & desktop, even offline — no app store needed

auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back — sign in to continue monitoring your electricity.

scanMeter.title: Scan Meter
scanMeter.description: Capture or upload a photo of your electricity meter so AI OCR can extract the current reading.

processing.title: Processing
processing.description: Temporary screen shown while OCR and AI analyze your meter, calculate Sheriha tier, bill estimate, and generate tips.

dashboard.title: User Dashboard
dashboard.description: Your home view for current consumption, electricity tier (Sheriha), estimated bill, and tier-up warnings.

history.title: History
history.description: Browse previous meter scans, consumption trends, bill estimates, and Sheriha tier changes over time.

scanDetails.title: Scan Details
scanDetails.description: Full details for a single meter scan including OCR output, calculations, and AI tips generated for that reading.

tips.title: Tips & Recommendations
tips.description: Personalized electricity-saving advice powered by AI, plus general guidance with estimated savings.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: View your account details and profile picture.
profile.loadError: Could not load your profile. Try logging in again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your language, notifications, and appearance preferences.

about.title: About
about.description: Learn about Kashf's mission, how AI and OCR power the platform, and our privacy commitments.

notFound.title: 404 — Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist. Return to the welcome page or your dashboard.

adminDashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
adminDashboard.description: Operational overview of platform usage, OCR success rate, and system health.

usersManagement.title: Users Management
usersManagement.description: Search, inspect, and moderate user accounts.
sections: Users table with search and filters

scanManagement.title: Scan Management
scanManagement.description: Review all meter scans, OCR outcomes, and uploaded images.

tierManagement.title: Tier Management
tierManagement.description: Maintain Egyptian electricity tier (Sheriha) rules, pricing tables, and kWh thresholds.

aiLogs.title: AI Logs
aiLogs.description: Audit OCR and generative AI requests for debugging and compliance.

notificationsManagement.title: Notifications Management
notificationsManagement.description: Create and manage system announcements and user notifications.

systemSettings.title: System Settings
systemSettings.description: Configure Gemini API, OCR settings, upload limits, and security policies.
